description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and fragmented representation of an adult pedestrian, with a human-like head featuring long, straight hair and a partial upper torso visible. The rest of the form is stretched and warped, with elongated, angular extensions and irregular surfaces that do not resemble natural human anatomy. The asset's surfaces are mostly smooth and reflective, with some matte areas, and the overall structure is interspersed with sharp, jagged elements. The head and partial arm are the only recognizable human features, while the rest of the object is abstract and non-functional. There are no visible clothing details or accessories, and the lower body and legs are not discernible. The asset gives the impression of a corrupted or glitched digital model rather than a realistic pedestrian.
description: A distorted, fragmented adult figure with a recognizable head and arm, surrounded by stretched, angular, and reflective surfaces. The form is abstract and lacks clear human anatomy or clothing details.
description_view_0: The head and part of the upper torso are visible, surrounded by jagged, stretched surfaces and angular extensions.
description_view_1: The side of the head and a partial arm are seen, with elongated, reflective structures extending outward.
description_view_2: The head is partially obscured by angular, intersecting surfaces, with little recognizable anatomy.
description_view_3: A profile of the head and arm is visible, with the rest of the form appearing as a long, warped extension.
attribute_posture: fragmented and distorted, no clear posture
